# Data Power Analytics

> Data systems built for growth, clearer decisions, and measurable momentum.

Data Power Analytics helps organizations turn questions, challenges, and scattered information into confident, data-driven decisions. The team provides data strategy, analytics, digital research, training, governance, and proposal support.

## Services

- [Data Strategy & Roadmap](https://datapoweranalytics.com/services/data-strategy-roadmap): Define the data priorities, operating model, and practical roadmap behind better decisions.
- [Advanced Analytics & Business Intelligence](https://datapoweranalytics.com/services/advanced-analytics-business-intelligence): Build useful analytics, reporting, and business intelligence systems.
- [Social Media & Digital Research](https://datapoweranalytics.com/services/social-media-digital-research): Understand digital conversations, audience behavior, campaigns, and public signals.
- [Training](https://datapoweranalytics.com/services/training): Build team confidence with practical data, analytics, and governance training.
- [Proposal & RFP Support](https://datapoweranalytics.com/services/proposal-rfp-support): Strengthen proposals with research, evidence, and clear project plans.
